testcase.name: testt

error.message: Method timeOut_and_exception.testt()[pri:0, instance:testNG.timeOut_and_exception@6580cfdd] should have thrown an exception of any of types [class java.util.NoSuchElementException, class java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException]
